message:
fix(curate): Prefer active bullets over deprecated when finding similar

Improve findSimilarBullet to prioritize active bullets over deprecated
ones. This prevents a deprecated/blocked match from preempting a valid
active match while still detecting zombie/resurrection attempts.

Search order:
1. Active bullets only (not deprecated, not retired)
2. Fallback to deprecated bullets (to prevent resurrection)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
